module.name: Concurrency Count
module.changelog: *2.1.0* Engine selector (experimental). Adds 'sweep' engine implementing the sweep-line algorithm for concurrency calculation, alongside the original per-second occupancy algorithm. Default behaviour unchanged. Demo mode can compare engines against the same synthetic fixture and report per-engine accuracy + wall time + peak memory. UI exposes "Engine (experimental)" selector; CLI adds --engine and --compare flags. Original remains the default reference engine. *2.0.0* Initial release. UI module port of the Concurrency Count CLI tool. Calculates maximum concurrent calls per PJSIP trunk, extension, or group within a date range. Email and download output, no database persistence.
module.description: Calculates maximum concurrent PJSIP calls per trunk, extension, or group across a date range. Companion to the Concurrency Count CLI tool (concurrency-count) shipped via IN1CLICK - NOT CURRENTLY SUITABLE FOR PRODUCTION. Read-only against asteriskcdrdb. Results can be viewed in the browser, downloaded as CSV, or emailed.
